title: スプリンターズSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I have a feeling Sakura Bakushin O will win today.
Sprints are her specialty, after all.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Sure, but you know everyone's attention is going to be on Biko Pegasus and Hishi Akebono today. Their height difference is ridiculous!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
The news really hyped this race up, saying this will
be a truly "mismatched match." I even brought my
camera to capture the hilarity.

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Look at all these people. I've never been to a
racecourse before...

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Me neither. Man, I can't wait to see Bono race
with my own eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono is in top form for her race today,
but the energy in the stands is lukewarm at best.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Meanwhile, in the waiting room...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Haha... I've got jitters.
choice_data_list: You look cool as a carrot to me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. I get that a lot, but I really am nervous.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
So many people commented on my Umasta
wishing me good luck and saying they'll be
watching from the stands.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'm worried about whether I'll be able to nail
every palm strike and overhand throw today... I
sure hope so...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear, oh dear. Maybe listing out all the
vegetables in chanko will help me calm down.
Let's see, there's green onions and cabbage...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Hi there, you two! I came to say hi! Here's to a
good race today!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Biko! Thanks for coming! Yeah, let's have a
good race! I'm not gonna lose, though!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Good. Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's nothing. I'm just getting some pre-race
nerves...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
But seeing your smile made them all go away!
That's all!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Really? That's so interesting!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hm? That's strange...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Actually, my jitters are gone too!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Chatting with you must have done the trick.
Ehehe.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: You get nervous too, Bono? Haha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two face each other and hold out their hands
at the same time.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: There's no way I'm losing today, Biko!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Same goes for me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They share a hardy handshake—and the Sprinters
S. is underway!
